# Review Image Overrides

Put replacement assets here using the same relative path as the public template asset.

Example:
- Default asset: `docs/_static/manual_template/page_jp/03_product_overview_placeholder/slot_01.jpg`
- Review override: `docs/_review/JE-1000F/US/overrides/_static/manual_template/page_jp/03_product_overview_placeholder/slot_01.jpg`

When a matching file exists here, bundle generation will use this override instead of the default asset.
